summary: Align AI Chat, reasoning copy, and decision detail surfaces with seller vocabulary (đề xuất, SPS/AHR); remove seller-facing confidence labels across web UI.

interfaceChanges.description: Seller-facing prompts and mock replies use đề xuất vocabulary; confidence omitted from replies.
expected_impact copy no longer surfaces độ tin cậy to sellers.

mappings.criterion: Grep audit: no seller-facing độ tin cậy / confidence labels in web UI
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue210_vocabulary_alignment.test.ts::chat welcome and mock replies omit confidence labels

mappings.criterion: SPS/AHR labels match shop-health-metrics.ts on all screens
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue210_vocabulary_alignment.test.ts::SPS AHR labels match shop-health-metrics on decision analytics

mappings.criterion: Integration test or snapshot for chat context strings (optional)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue210_vocabulary_alignment.test.ts::chat suggested prompts use đề xuất vocabulary
